assessments.title: Foundations module test
assessments.description: Answer theory questions from best-practices topics covered in this module.

assessments.title: Vehicle control module test
assessments.description: Answer theory questions on steering, braking, and gears.

assessments.title: Traffic rules module test
assessments.description: Answer theory questions on licences, documents, and right of way.

assessments.title: Road signs module test
assessments.description: Answer questions on traffic lights and signals from this module.

assessments.title: Junctions module test
assessments.description: Mixed theory review plus practical driving at T-junctions and cross junctions.

assessments.title: Road markings module test
assessments.description: Theory on lane rules plus practical driving on markings and crossings.

assessments.title: Parking module test
assessments.description: Answer theory questions on where and how to park legally.

assessments.title: Emergencies & weather module test
assessments.description: Safety theory plus practical ambulance reaction and adverse-weather driving.
